\citet{GaiaNSS2023}: Gold requires GOF~$< 25$,
significance~$> 20\sigma$, and $\sigma_e < 0.1$;
Silver relaxes one criterion; Bronze relaxes two or more.
\emph{Rankings reflect observational accessibility and are not
evidence for the reality of any individual solution.}
